title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Delhivery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
